column1: Worksheet 4: Average daily time (minutes) spent doing specified activities, all adults: by sex
Great Britain, March to April 2020 to March 2021 and United Kingdom, March 2022 to March 2024

This worksheet contains three tables. Tables 4a and 4b are presented next to each other horizontally with a blank column in between. Tables 4a and 4c are presented vertically with a blank row in between.
Table 4a contains average (mean) estimates. Table 4b contains the associated confidence intervals. Table 1c contains the weighted counts and sample sizes.
LCL = lower confidence interval. UCL = upper confidence interval.
Volunteering as part of a group, organisation, charity or sports club
Entertainment, socialising and other free time
Table 4c: Associated weighted counts and sample sizes
